title: Splitting p0 (6wp) to p1 (T75)
author: Andrea Argouarch
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.8gjhtun

steps.title: Turn off UV lights and clean hood with 70% ethanol
steps.instruction: Turn off UV lights and clean hood with 70% ethanol

steps.title: Throw away biohazard materials properly a
steps.instruction: Throw away biohazard materials properly a. 10 cm dishes with glass coverslips should be thrown away in biohazard red sharp container

steps.title: Clean surgical tools, wear waterproof lab...
steps.instruction: Clean surgical tools, wear waterproof lab coat and eye protection/PPE a. Brush and clean with 409 soap water. Rinse with water, dry on kimwipe, rinse with 100% ethanol, and then dry completely with kimwipe to prevent rust or water marks. b. Prep for next autoclaving cycle

steps.title: Clean and sterilize hood with 70%...
steps.instruction: Clean and sterilize hood with 70% ethanol and turn on UV

steps.title: After 3 weeks, split 6 wells...
steps.instruction: After 3 weeks, split 6 wells of the 6 well plate (6wx6wp) into 1xT75 flask a. Keep 6wp as backup by re-feeding the entire plate after trypsinization.

steps.title: Cells will grow on the plastic...
steps.instruction: Cells will grow on the plastic and maybe on the glass coverslip itself

steps.title: Clean items with 70% ethanol and bring into hood a
steps.instruction: Clean items with 70% ethanol and bring into hood a. Autoclaved # 5 Forceps Dumont #5 Forceps Fine Science Tools Catalog #11251-30 b. 10 cm dish for forceps, cell scraper, discarded coverslips, and discarded tissue c. Sterile cell scraper GeneMate Cell Scrapers & Lifter VWR International (Avantor) Catalog # 490000-254 d. DPBS -/- DPBS, no calcium, no magnesium Thermo Fisher Catalog #14190250 e. Sterile Filtered Media with PenStrep DMEM, high glucose, pyruvate Thermo Fisher Catalog #11995073 Penicillin-Streptomycin Gibco - Thermo Fisher Scientific Catalog #15140122 Fetal Bovine Serum VWR International (Avantor) Catalog #97068-091 f. Label 1xT75 flask with ID, date, and p1, add 15 mls 15 mL of media per flask g. 0.05% Trypsin Trypsin-EDTA (0.05%), phenol red Thermo Fisher Catalog #25300062 i. Aliquot and warm before use

steps.title: Aspirate old media
steps.instruction: Aspirate old media

steps.title: Rinse by adding 3 mls 3...
steps.instruction: Rinse by adding 3 mls 3 mL of DPBS per well

steps.title: Lift coverslips with forceps to allow...
steps.instruction: Lift coverslips with forceps to allow adequate washing under the coverslip and gently swirl

steps.title: Aspirate DPBS
steps.instruction: Aspirate DPBS

steps.title: Add 2 ml 2 mL of...
steps.instruction: Add 2 ml 2 mL of trypsin per well and lift coverslips breifly with forceps

steps.title: Place in incubator 37 °C for...
steps.instruction: Place in incubator 37 °C for ~5 mins 00:05:00 until cells start to detach a. Can also gently tap the side of the plate to detach cells from the coverslip

steps.title: Add 2 mls 2 mL of...
steps.instruction: Add 2 mls 2 mL of media per well to inactivate trypsin

steps.title: With forceps, flip over coverslip within each well a
steps.instruction: With forceps, flip over coverslip within each well a. Can remove tissue and place in 10 cm dish to discard

steps.title: Use cell scraper to gently scrap...
steps.instruction: Use cell scraper to gently scrap off cells in each well attached to the coverslip

steps.title: Discard each coverslip in the 10 cm dish
steps.instruction: Discard each coverslip in the 10 cm dish

steps.title: Use cell scraper to scrap off...
steps.instruction: Use cell scraper to scrap off remaining cells (cells that are attached to bottom of plate)

steps.title: Check under microscope and mark areas...
steps.instruction: Check under microscope and mark areas with cells still attached with a pen

steps.title: Re-scrape cell gently if needed
steps.instruction: Re-scrape cell gently if needed

steps.title: Collect cell suspension in a 50 ml conical
steps.instruction: Collect cell suspension in a 50 ml conical

steps.title: Rinse wells with additional media ~6mls...
steps.instruction: Rinse wells with additional media ~6mls 6 mL to collect any remaining cells

steps.title: Spin at 1000 rpm 1000 rpm for 5 mins 00:05:00
steps.instruction: Spin at 1000 rpm 1000 rpm for 5 mins 00:05:00

steps.title: Re-feed old 6wp plate for backup,...
steps.instruction: Re-feed old 6wp plate for backup, 2 mls 2 mL per well

steps.title: Aspirate supernatant, being careful to not aspirate the pellet
steps.instruction: Aspirate supernatant, being careful to not aspirate the pellet

steps.title: Tap the pellet to resuspend
steps.instruction: Tap the pellet to resuspend

steps.title: Add media to a final volume...
steps.instruction: Add media to a final volume of 5 mls 5 mL and pipette up and down to mix

steps.title: Add cell suspension to flask
steps.instruction: Add cell suspension to flask

steps.title: Place flask in incubator (5% CO2,...
steps.instruction: Place flask in incubator (5% CO2, 37 o C) 37 °C

steps.title: Observe and feed the next day...
steps.instruction: Observe and feed the next day to remove debris, then feed every 2-3 days until 90-100% confluent

description: Update cell culture notes in lab notebook
